meta.title: ATLVS Ecosystem — Information Architecture
meta.source: Generated from src/lib/nav.ts + the src/app route tree. Do not hand-edit — run `npm run gen:ia-map`.
meta.note: Single source of truth for the LEG3ND Architecture reference. Any platform-level nav/route change regenerates this file and the interactive map re-renders from it.
meta.addressing: Subdomain is the canonical public boundary; routeGroup is the internal route-group name the host-rewrite middleware maps onto (and the path-prefix fallback for preview deploys). Production URLs never double the prefix.

SHELL.name: Global chrome
SHELL.desc: Wraps every page in a shell.
